vulnerabilities.title: Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution (Log4Shell)
vulnerabilities.description: Apache Log4j2 2.0-beta9 through 2.15.0 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints. An attacker who can control log messages or log message parameters can execute arbitrary code loaded from LDAP servers.

vulnerabilities.title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack (DDoS)
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP/2 protocol allows a denial of service because request cancellation can reset many streams quickly, as exploited in the wild in August through October 2023.

vulnerabilities.title: XZ Utils Backdoor (Supply Chain Compromise)
vulnerabilities.description: Malicious code was discovered in xz/liblzma versions 5.6.0 and 5.6.1 that could allow unauthorized remote access via a backdoor inserted through a compromised maintainer account.

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Outlook contains a critical privilege escalation vulnerability that allows an attacker to send a specially crafted email that triggers authentication to an attacker-controlled SMB server, leaking the victim's Net-NTLMv2 hash.

vulnerabilities.title: Zimbra Collaboration Suite RCE
vulnerabilities.description: Zimbra Collaboration (ZCS) allows remote code execution through mboximport functionality with specially crafted requests, combined with an authentication bypass.

vulnerabilities.title: MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Progress MOVEit Transfer contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain access to the database. Exploited by Cl0p ransomware group.

vulnerabilities.title: Windows Print Spooler RCE (PrintNightmare)
vulnerabilities.description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists when the Windows Print Spooler service improperly performs privileged file operations, allowing attackers to install programs and create new accounts.

vulnerabilities.title: Spring4Shell - Spring Framework RCE
vulnerabilities.description: Spring Framework versions 5.3.0 to 5.3.17 and 5.2.0 to 5.2.19 contain an RCE vulnerability via data binding to a ClassLoader accessible from a property path.

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Office HTML RCE (Storm-0978)
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft is investigating reports of remote code execution vulnerabilities impacting Windows and Office products via specially crafted Office documents.

vulnerabilities.title: FortiOS SSL VPN Out-of-Bounds Write
vulnerabilities.description: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in Fortinet FortiOS allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specially crafted HTTP requests.

threat_actors.name: APT29 (Cozy Bear)
threat_actors.description: A sophisticated threat group attributed to Russian intelligence services (SVR). Known for long-term strategic intelligence collection targeting government and diplomatic entities.

threat_actors.name: Lazarus Group
threat_actors.alias: Hidden Cobra, Guardians of Peace, ZINC
threat_actors.description: North Korean state-sponsored group known for financially motivated attacks, cryptocurrency theft, and destructive operations including the Sony Pictures hack.

threat_actors.name: Cl0p Ransomware
threat_actors.description: Financially motivated cybercriminal group known for large-scale data extortion campaigns, notably exploiting the MOVEit Transfer vulnerability in 2023.

threat_actors.name: Volt Typhoon
threat_actors.description: Chinese state-sponsored group focused on espionage and pre-positioning in critical infrastructure networks in the United States and allied nations.

threat_actors.name: LockBit
threat_actors.description: Ransomware-as-a-Service operation that became the most prolific ransomware group globally. Known for rapid encryption and double-extortion tactics.

scenarios.name: Log4Shell Exploitation Chain
scenarios.description: Attacker exploits CVE-2021-44228 in an internet-facing Java application to achieve remote code execution, installs a reverse shell, and exfiltrates data.

scenarios.name: Spearphishing to Ransomware Deployment
scenarios.description: Threat actor sends targeted phishing emails with weaponized Office documents, achieves initial access, performs lateral movement, and deploys ransomware.

scenarios.name: Supply Chain Backdoor via XZ Utils
scenarios.description: Attacker compromises upstream open-source dependency, inserts backdoor that provides unauthorized SSH access to downstream systems.

scenarios.name: Credential Harvesting via Outlook Exploit
scenarios.description: APT group exploits CVE-2023-23397 to leak NTLMv2 hashes without user interaction, then uses captured credentials for lateral movement.

scenarios.name: VPN Gateway Compromise for Persistence
scenarios.description: Nation-state actor exploits FortiOS vulnerability to gain access to VPN gateway, establishes persistent access to corporate network.
